message:
fix: use dangerouslySetInnerHTML for GA script to fix appendChild error

The template literal children in Next.js Script component was causing
RSC serialization issues with Turbopack, resulting in:
"Failed to execute 'appendChild' on 'Node': Invalid or unexpected token"

Using dangerouslySetInnerHTML bypasses this serialization problem.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
